query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS system_config (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  config_key VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  config_value TEXT NOT NULL,
  description VARCHAR(500),
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) * 1000),
  updated_by VARCHAR(255)
);

INSERT INTO system_config (config_key, config_value, description) VALUES
('restream_studio_url', '', 'Restream studio URL — paste your Restream room link here and all live/studio buttons will use it'),
('restream_channel_id', '', 'Restream channel ID for API integration'),
('cj_battle_apple_music_url', 'https://music.apple.com/us/artist/c-j-battle/1438716457', 'C.J. Battle Apple Music artist page URL')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE config_value = VALUES(config_value);
